surface.name: Dashboard Git deployment
surface.selection_basis: The dashboard imports and deploys a Git repository without requiring the Vercel CLI or a local deployment command.

alternatives_considered.name: Vercel CLI deployment
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: It requires local CLI installation and authentication; the dashboard Git path is fully hosted.

entry_point.developer_intent: Create a Vercel account, import a Git repository, and open the first hosted deployment.
assumed_prior_state: The developer begins before account creation with no platform resources or credentials.
A supported browser and internet connection are available.

documented_first_success.official_milestone: Deploy a Git repository to Vercel
documented_first_success.normalized_outcome: Vercel builds the imported repository and serves a production deployment URL.
documented_first_success.observable_completion_signal: The deployment shows Ready and its generated URL loads the application.

boundary_evidence.official_label_or_terminal_state: The deployment shows Ready and its generated URL loads the application.

documented_first_success.why_this_is_the_boundary: This is the first observable end-to-end result on the selected official surface; later production configuration and expansion follow it.

prerequisites.requirement: A supported Git provider account with a deployable repository.
Permission for Vercel to access the selected repository.

primary_path.action: Create or sign in to Vercel.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Correct the documented configuration or prerequisite before continuing.

primary_path.action: Authorize the Git provider and choose Add New Project.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Correct the documented configuration or prerequisite before continuing.

primary_path.action: Import the repository and review the detected framework and project settings.
primary_path.output: The project is ready to deploy.
primary_path.success_signal: The project is ready to deploy.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Correct the documented configuration or prerequisite before continuing.

primary_path.output: Vercel starts the build and deployment.
primary_path.success_signal: Vercel starts the build and deployment.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Correct the documented configuration or prerequisite before continuing.

primary_path.action: Wait for the deployment to reach Ready.
primary_path.output: A production deployment URL is available.
primary_path.success_signal: A production deployment URL is available.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Correct the documented configuration or prerequisite before continuing.
Correct the documented configuration or prerequisite before continuing.

friction_gates.description: The Git provider must authorize Vercel to read the repository.
The build and deployment must complete before the URL is ready.

uncertainties.question: Git-provider authorization screens and build configuration vary by repository and framework.
uncertainties.impact: The exact number or ordering of required onboarding actions may vary for a fresh account.
uncertainties.reason_unresolved: Public official documentation does not fully expose every authenticated or account-dependent state.

excluded_after_success: Production hardening, scale configuration, and ongoing operations after the first successful result.
